## Testing

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q`
- [ ] `python -m ruff check .`
- [ ] `python -m mypy --strict aztec_py`
- [ ] `python -m build`
- [ ] (if applicable) `python scripts/decoder_matrix.py --report compat_matrix_report.md`

- Any known risk or rollout concern

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes
- [ ] Docs updated for user-facing changes
- [ ] Changelog updated (if needed)
